channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Thousands of children absent from school in wake of overnigh…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: Thousands of children absent from school in wake of overnight England World Cup win
item.content:encoded: Thousands of children absent from school in wake of overnight England World Cup win

item.title: Keir Starmer intervened to oppose Fifa’s plan to move Englan…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: Keir Starmer intervened to oppose Fifa’s plan to move England kick-off time
item.content:encoded: Keir Starmer intervened to oppose Fifa’s plan to move England kick-off time

item.title: Heavy rain will trigger flood watches from Ohio to southeast…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Heavy rain will trigger flood watches from Ohio to southeastern Massachusetts, including New York City, and as far south as North Carolina, according to the National Weather Service.
item.content:encoded: Heavy rain will trigger flood watches from Ohio to southeastern Massachusetts, including New York City, and as far south as North Carolina, according to the National Weather Service.

item.title: Last year, Cracker Barrel's plans for modernization inadvert…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Last year, Cracker Barrel's plans for modernization inadvertently thrust the company into a broader culture war. https://cnn.it/3RgBMVU
item.content:encoded: Last year, Cracker Barrel's plans for modernization inadvertently thrust the company into a broader culture war. https://cnn.it/3RgBMVU

item.title: A Level 3 of 4 flash flood risk covers New York City, Long I…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: A Level 3 of 4 flash flood risk covers New York City, Long Island and parts of southern New England as heavy rain ramps up throughout the day.
item.content:encoded: A Level 3 of 4 flash flood risk covers New York City, Long Island and parts of southern New England as heavy rain ramps up throughout the day.

item.title: President Donald Trump made a direct request to the head of …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: President Donald Trump made a direct request to the head of FIFA and received daily briefings, while the White House offered its attorneys to U.S. Soccer to help in the appeal.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump made a direct request to the head of FIFA and received daily briefings, while the White House offered its attorneys to U.S. Soccer to help in the appeal.

item.title: The president says he has "saved" crypto, but some believe h…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: The president says he has "saved" crypto, but some believe he could do more to halt Bitcoin's ongoing decline.
item.content:encoded: The president says he has "saved" crypto, but some believe he could do more to halt Bitcoin's ongoing decline.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 「その手があったか！」アニメ『天幕のジャードゥーガル』ではモンゴル兵の声をモンゴル語ネイティブの現…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
「その手があったか！」アニメ『天幕のジャードゥーガル』ではモンゴル兵の声をモンゴル語ネイティブの現役力士が担当しているというこだわりっぷり

大山 @o_yama ジャードゥーガル昨晩たまたま起きていて見たんだけど、モンゴル兵の声をモンゴル語ネイティブの人たちが当てていて知らない言語を話す集団が襲ってくる恐怖の描き方が容赦なかった　しかもそのモンゴル語声優が現役力士というその手があったか！という人材登用 2026-07-05 10:15:11 『天幕のジャードゥー...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
「その手があったか！」アニメ『天幕のジャードゥーガル』ではモンゴル兵の声をモンゴル語ネイティブの現役力士が担当しているというこだわりっぷり

大山 @o_yama ジャードゥーガル昨晩たまたま起きていて見たんだけど、モンゴル兵の声をモンゴル語ネイティブの人たちが当てていて知らない言語を話す集団が襲ってくる恐怖の描き方が容赦なかった　しかもそのモンゴル語声優が現役力士というその手があったか！という人材登用 2026-07-05 10:15:11 『天幕のジャードゥー...

item.title: US President Donald Trump said he expected to meet with Chin…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: US President Donald Trump said he expected to meet with Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping around Sept. 24, which would coincide with the UN General Assembly in New York that month.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said he expected to meet with Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping around Sept. 24, which would coincide with the UN General Assembly in New York that month.

item.title: Hamas announces the dissolution of the body that has governe…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Hamas announces the dissolution of the body that has governed the Gaza Strip for nearly two decades as the militant group prepares to hand over power to a technocratic committee backed by President Trump.
item.content:encoded: Hamas announces the dissolution of the body that has governed the Gaza Strip for nearly two decades as the militant group prepares to hand over power to a technocratic committee backed by President Trump.

item.title: EasyJet shares jump almost 10% after it agrees £5.5bn takeov…

item.content:encoded: EasyJet shares jump almost 10% after it agrees £5.5bn takeover bid

item.title: President Trump defended that he had asked the head of world…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: President Trump defended that he had asked the head of world soccer’s governing body for the review that ultimately led to the remarkable reversal of a U.S. player’s one-game suspension at the World Cup, saying there “wasn’t a foul.”
item.content:encoded: President Trump defended that he had asked the head of world soccer’s governing body for the review that ultimately led to the remarkable reversal of a U.S. player’s one-game suspension at the World Cup, saying there “wasn’t a foul.”

item.title: AI-focused studio Particle 6 plans a full-length feature fil…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
AI-focused studio Particle 6 plans a full-length feature film to be led by the AI "actor" Tilly Norwood, as a hybrid production using film and TV professionals (Alex Ritman/Variety)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
AI-focused studio Particle 6 plans a full-length feature film to be led by the AI "actor" Tilly Norwood, as a hybrid production using film and TV professionals (Alex Ritman/Variety)

item.title: Prosecutors begin a five-day presentation of evidence as the…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)

item.content:encoded: Prosecutors begin a five-day presentation of evidence as they seek to have Tyler Robinson, the man accused of assassinating Charlie Kirk, stand trial for murder.

item.content:encoded: Microsoft is eliminating about 4,800 jobs — about 2.1% of the company’s global workforce — with its Xbox gaming unit among the hardest hit. https://cnn.it/4eOxE8A

item.title: Brookfield won a key court ruling against funds managed by J…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Brookfield won a key court ruling against funds managed by Joh. Berenberg, Gossler & Co. in the battle for control of bankrupt solar-power company GoldenPeaks.
item.content:encoded: Brookfield won a key court ruling against funds managed by Joh. Berenberg, Gossler & Co. in the battle for control of bankrupt solar-power company GoldenPeaks.

item.title: A White House report brands the leadership of the Smithsonia…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A White House report brands the leadership of the Smithsonian Institution, especially at the National Museum of American History, as radical activists who cannot be trusted, indicating that President Trump may be preparing to install his own team.
item.content:encoded: A White House report brands the leadership of the Smithsonian Institution, especially at the National Museum of American History, as radical activists who cannot be trusted, indicating that President Trump may be preparing to install his own team.

item.title: “It’s the next best thing from being in the stadium.” Despit…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: “It’s the next best thing from being in the stadium.” Despite the 2 a.m. kickoff time in London, for England fans, staying up to watch the World Cup match against Mexico was the only option. nyti.ms/4wkGUr0
item.content:encoded: “It’s the next best thing from being in the stadium.” Despite the 2 a.m. kickoff time in London, for England fans, staying up to watch the World Cup match against Mexico was the only option. nyti.ms/4wkGUr0

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [第240話]ダンダダン - 龍幸伸 | 少年ジャンプ＋ ダンダダン 龍幸伸 <毎週火曜更新！最…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第240話]ダンダダン - 龍幸伸 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ダンダダン 龍幸伸 <毎週火曜更新！最新2話無料>TVアニメ第3期 制作決定！　幽霊を信じないオカルトマニアの少年・高倉と、宇宙人を信じない少女・綾瀬は、互いの理解を超越した圧倒的怪奇に出会う――…！オカルティック青春物語!! [JC25巻9/4発売予定]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第240話]ダンダダン - 龍幸伸 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ダンダダン 龍幸伸 <毎週火曜更新！最新2話無料>TVアニメ第3期 制作決定！　幽霊を信じないオカルトマニアの少年・高倉と、宇宙人を信じない少女・綾瀬は、互いの理解を超越した圧倒的怪奇に出会う――…！オカルティック青春物語!! [JC25巻9/4発売予定]

item.title: The prosecution of Tyler Robinson, who is accused of assassi…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The prosecution of Tyler Robinson, who is accused of assassinating Charlie Kirk, will be one of the year’s most closely scrutinized murder cases. Here is how the case has unfolded.
item.content:encoded: The prosecution of Tyler Robinson, who is accused of assassinating Charlie Kirk, will be one of the year’s most closely scrutinized murder cases. Here is how the case has unfolded.

item.title: Western Europe is bracing for the summer’s third major heat …
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Western Europe is bracing for the summer’s third major heat wave, fueling dangerous wildfire conditions and straining power systems across the region.
item.content:encoded: Western Europe is bracing for the summer’s third major heat wave, fueling dangerous wildfire conditions and straining power systems across the region.

item.title: CNN's Ben Church takes you inside a chaotic 24 hours of the …

item.title: Riots inside a Sri Lanka prison on Sunday and Monday killed …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Riots inside a Sri Lanka prison on Sunday and Monday killed at least 23 people and left 15 critically injured, authorities said, in one of the worst outbreaks of violence among inmates in decades.
item.content:encoded: Riots inside a Sri Lanka prison on Sunday and Monday killed at least 23 people and left 15 critically injured, authorities said, in one of the worst outbreaks of violence among inmates in decades.

item.author: Fox News - Breaking News Updates | Latest News Headlines | Phot… (@foxnews.com.web.brid.gy)
